# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-config-master
data:
  config.yml: |-
    # Cluster Configuration
    network.host: 0.0.0.0
    
    http.cors.enabled: true
    http.cors.allow-origin: "*"

    bootstrap.mlockall: true
    
    cluster.routing.allocation.disk.threshold_used: "95%" 
    cluster.routing.allocation.node_concurrent_recoveries: 3 
    
    index.search.slowlog.threshold.query.name: "indices:query*"
    index.search.slowlog.threshold.query.level: info

    indices.recovery.max_size_per_sec: '10mb'
    discovery.zen.minimum_master_nodes: 2
    
    http.port: 9200
  elasticsearch-keystore: |-
    # Elasticsearch configuration for secrets and encryption
    
    password_hash:
